name: Spartacus Card Game
short_description: Spartacus Card Game is a Gladiator Fighting Card Game for 1 to 2 players.
detailed_description:
Spartacus Card Game is a Gladiator Fighting Card Game for 1 to 2 players. In the Single Player game you travel to different Roman towns to do battle with other Gladiators for the pleasure of the crowd. If you gain their favor you may be able to climb the tournament ladder to face the most Illustrious Gladiator of all time!
Have one-off battles against the AI or play hotseat mode with a friend!

Players take turns choosing Gladiator Attack and Defense Cards then comparing them for hit results. Players must decide when to use special abilities for the best outcomes. Whoever kills the enemy Gladiator while their own Gladiator alive is a victor.
